arts.ttl: How Marcus Rashford declined from Man United's golden boy to an Old Trafford outcast - and why Aston Villa could be the perfect place to get his mojo back: THE SHARPE END
arts.sum: THE SHARPE END: How long ago if feels now that the sight of Marcus Rashford bursting forward with the ball at his feet would bring Manchester United supporters to the edge of their seats.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery rejects Ruben Amorim's Marcus Rashford verdict
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery disagreed with his Manchester United counterpart when it came to Marcus Rashford's training attitude.

arts.ttl: Manchester United icon has given Marcus Rashford blueprint for Aston Villa success
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Ryan Giggs has offered up some advice to Marcus Rashford following his loan move to Aston Villa during January's transfer window. "Everyone will remember that smile and that enjoyment and freedom when he [Rashford] first came through, but he doesn't look like that now," said Giggs in an interview with The Sun .

arts.ttl: Tottenham icon Harry Kane gives two-word £54m transfer response amid Premier League return links
arts.sum: Former Tottenham striker Harry Kane has refused to comment on the reported release clause in his Bayern Munich contract that could see him make a return to the Premier League in the future. Kane left Spurs in 2023 for a deal worth around £82million after scoring 280 goals for the north Londoners.

arts.ttl: Tottenham 'hold discussions' over two transfers as Daniel Levy prepares 'aggressive push'
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur reportedly earmark two English talents whom they want to lead their youth-driven revolution for the 2025-26 campaign.

arts.ttl: It's easy to stick boot in to Spurs - Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham head coach Ange Postecoglou says the criticism of his side is "really easy".

arts.ttl: Tottenham board have five options to replace Ange Postecoglou after players ‘quit’ on him
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou is under increasing pressure at Tottenham Hotspur after a wretched start to the season, with the Australian coach reportedly in danger of losing his job

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou provides worrying Micky van de Ven injury update
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has delivered a concerning injury update on Tottenham defender Micky van de Ven.

arts.ttl: Man City and Pep Guardiola left stunned by Tottenham loanee after outrageous goal in FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur youngster Jamie Donley continued his impressive loan spell at Leyton Orient with a superb goal in the FA Cup against Manchester City. Donley continued his fine league form in the FA Cup against English champions City with a remarkable goal.

arts.ttl: Tottenham players 'quit on Ange Postecoglou' as post-match decision revealed
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou's Tottenham Hotspur were beaten 4-0 by Liverpool at Anfield on Thursday night as the Londoners saw their hopes of Carabao Cup glory come to a painful end
